title: Gridd Table Schema
description: One table defined for the Gridd rendering application.

cols.description: Column weights and spacer widths defining how many columns to render.

anyOf.description: Spacers keep a fixed pixel width between columns, e.g. s24 is a 24px wide spacer.
Star sizing: '*' means take a share of the remaining space (weight = 1).

rows.description: Row weights and spacer heights defining how many rows to render.

anyOf.description: Spacers keep a fixed pixel height between rows, e.g. s24 is a 24px tall spacer.
Star sizing: '*' means take a share of the remaining space (weight = 1).

cells.description: Two dimensional matrix to hold text content for each cell defined by cols and rows. Each cell can have only one style.

id.description: GUID v4 value to uniquely identify this cell. Used to connect with style descriptions.

text.description: Plain multi-line text representation of content.

json.description: Rich text representation of the text and bullets contained in the cell for TipTap data structure.

cellStyles.description: Complex object describing each cell's font styling, background, icons and shapes, etc.

{guid}.description: The cell's GUID v4 id value connecting this style exactly to one cell that exists in the cells matrix.

preset.description: One of the six preset names existing in the stylesheet.

borders.description: Each location can have more than one borders with different styles are described in this array.

id.description: GUID v4 value to uniquely identify border for editing

index.description: The slot this border is drawn in

isVertical.description: If true, the border is drawn vertically on the given column index.

from.description: The starting index from the border is drawn

to.description: The last index this border is drawn up to, or null to run to the end.

preset.description: The preset style this border is drawn with known by stylesheet.
